name: Get-MgUser
description: Look up a user by UPN or object id. Returns id, displayName, userPrincipalName, accountEnabled, mail.

UserId.description: UPN (email) or object id of the user

Search.description: displayName search (use instead of UserId when the operator gives a partial name)

name: Update-MgUser
description: Update properties on an existing user (block sign-in, change department, set employeeLeaveDateTime, etc.).

AccountEnabled.description: true to enable, false to block sign-in

name: Revoke-MgUserSignInSession
description: Kill every active sign-in session for a user (does NOT block future sign-ins -- pair with Update-MgUser -AccountEnabled:$false).

name: Get-UserOneDriveUrl
description: Resolve the personal OneDrive site URL for a user (Phase 3 OneDriveManager).

name: Get-UserTeams
description: List every team a user belongs to, with Member vs Owner role.
